items.title: Trump threatens more strikes on Iran as Tehran warns of 'fearless' response
items.summary: Speaking at a Nato summit, the president says the US will "probably" strike Iran again but added that "anything that happens will be over quickly".

items.title: US strikes target Iranian military boats
items.summary: The US has launched the strikes on Iran in response to attacks on three oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Ukraine to get licence to produce Patriot missiles, Trump says
items.summary: Although the Patriots are highly effective against Russia's ballistic missiles, they also have lengthy production times.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 川普淡化美伊升溫局勢　稱衝突很快就會結束
items.summary: 在美伊雙方互相發動軍事打擊後，美國總統川普今天表示，他預期美伊衝突「很快」就會結束。  川普在土耳其首都安卡拉舉行的北大西洋公約組織（NATO）峰會會後記者會上指出：「我不認為會再次爆發。我...…

items.title: 中國試射飛彈　太平洋島國萬那杜加入譴責行列
items.summary: 中國近日向太平洋試射一枚長程飛彈後，萬那杜今天加入譴責此舉的行列。在太平洋島國當中，萬那杜是中國最親近的夥伴之一。  中共解放軍海軍一艘戰略核潛艦於6日中午12時1分，發射一枚「攜載訓練模擬...…

items.title: 中男不滿馬國飯店沒掛五星旗 撂狠話反遭打臉 網友：中國沒晉級世足賽
items.summary: 繼日前1名中國女子在飛往馬來西亞的航班上鬧事還要求空服員「講中文」引發熱議後，類似「中馬衝突」近日竟上演續集，這回是1名中國男遊客不滿吉隆坡飯店內懸掛的萬國旗獨缺五星旗，拍片抱...…
